name: core.openwop.examples
description: Spec-canonical examples pack — three minimal nodes (echo, coin-flip, delay-with-progress) that exercise the core node-pack contract end-to-end. Zero npm deps; runs on any Node 20+ host advertising the openwop-node-packs profile. See docs/PACKS-MVP-PLAN.md.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

nodes.label: Echo
nodes.description: Returns the input verbatim. Pure / replay-safe / no side effects. Useful as a workflow smoke node and as a sentinel in conformance fixtures.

nodes.label: Coin Flip
nodes.description: Deterministic pseudo-random choice from a seed input. Returns 'heads' or 'tails'. Pure / replay-safe — same seed always returns same result. Demonstrates the cacheable + replay-determinism contracts.

nodes.label: Delay With Progress
nodes.description: Sleeps for `config.delayMs` milliseconds, streaming a node.progress event every `config.tickMs` (default 100). Demonstrates the streamable capability + bounded duration. Replay-safe — replays return the cached completed state without re-sleeping.

yankedReason: Unsigned manifest (signing block absent) + detached .sig verifies against no registered key — supersded by correctly-signed 1.0.1. See A2 finding.
